---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature solves or the use case it enables. Why is this valuable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen. Include any specific UI/UX ideas, API changes, or implementation notes if you have them.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why you prefer the proposed approach.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, links to prior art, or references that would help evaluate this request.
